overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring an abandoned campsite in a lush summer countryside, then walking along a winding dirt path through wildflower meadows and vineyard terraces with expansive mountain valley views.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned campsite with bloodstains and debris

events.description: approaching and entering the abandoned camp area with canvas tents
blood stains and scattered debris become visible on the ground near the tents

agents.ego_description: walking through the abandoned campsite examining the blood stains and scattered supplies

entered.detail: weathered beige canvas tents arranged in a small cluster
scattered wooden supply crates and boxes
wooden barrels lying on their sides near the tents
red blood stains splattered across the dirt ground indicating violence
extinguished campfire with stones and ash

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and enters an abandoned campsite with canvas tents and scattered wooden crates. Blood stains litter the dirt ground, suggesting a recent attack. The character walks through the camp examining the scene before continuing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through wildflower meadows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through lush meadows with mountains in the distance

entered.detail: tall green grass and wildflowers lining both sides of the path
solitary trees dotting the rolling landscape

segments.scene_description: Leaving the camp behind, the path winds through open meadows filled with wildflowers and tall grass. Scattered trees dot the landscape as the character walks steadily forward with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop overlook with vineyard terraces and valley views

events.description: character turns to the left to admire the panoramic valley view
path opens to reveal sweeping view of valley with vineyard rows and blooming orchards

agents.ego_description: walking along the hillside path and pausing to look at the scenic valley view with vineyards and distant farmhouse

entered.detail: terraced rows of grapevines descending the hillside
expansive view of the valley with layered mountains in the background
weathered wooden posts marking the path edge
white flowering fruit trees below the path
small wooden structure visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The path ascends slightly and opens to a breathtaking overlook of the valley below. Rows of vineyards and blooming orchards stretch across the landscape with a distant farmhouse visible. The character turns to admire the view before continuing along the ridge path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a grim, abandoned campsite into a sweeping, sun-drenched mountain vista. It begins with Geralt entering a camp of canvas tents and scattered wooden crates, where blood-stained dirt suggests a recent struggle. As he leaves the site behind, the scene opens into expansive meadows filled with tall grass and wildflowers, with the camera tracking his steady progress toward distant peaks. The path then ascends and shifts toward a breathtaking overlook, revealing rows of vineyards and blooming orchards stretching across a wide valley. Finally, the view expands to include a distant farmhouse before the camera follows the character along the ridge path.
